personality_one_liner: Cinematic, expensive, and atmospheric Michelin-style luxury with deep blacks and warm glowing gold/amber accents.

spacing.rule: Use generous vertical rhythm (lg/xl) to let the high-quality photography and elegant typography breathe. Avoid cramped layouts. Maintain consistent screen paddings.

do's: Use heavy glass on the bottom tab bar and sticky headers to create cinematic depth.
Apply frosted glass over brand-tinted or dark photo backdrops for featured menu items.
Ensure text on glass uses onSurface and has a tinted base (≥75% opacity) beneath for WCAG readability.
dont's: Never blur body text regions, form fields, or dense list rows.
Avoid stacking more than 2 glass surfaces on a single screen.

screens.name: Home
screens.purpose: Immerse the user in the Pizza Denfert brand story with premium photography of the wood-fired oven and local ingredients, leading them to order or reserve.

states.loading: Centered elegant gold spinner on pure black background.
states.empty: N/A - Home is static content and feature cards.
states.error: Elegant text message 'Unable to load our story' with a gold Retry button.

screens.layout: Cinematic full-screen hero image with vertical gradient scrim (0% to 80% surface at bottom) overlaying the restaurant name in Cormorant Garamond. Followed by elegant single-column story cards highlighting 'French Flour & Italian Cheese' with atmospheric wood-fired oven background photos. Minimalist sticky CTA at bottom.

screens.name: Menu
screens.purpose: Showcase the artisanal pizzas and menu items with dark, moody photography, elegant typography, and a seamless cart addition flow.

states.loading: Staggered skeleton cards with a subtle dark shimmer.
states.empty: Refined illustration/icon with 'Menu is currently being updated' and a refresh button.
states.error: Elegant error message with a retry option.

screens.layout: Sticky glass header with horizontally scrolling category pills (Traditional, Signature, etc.). Two-column grid for pizzas with edge-to-edge images in the card, a dark vertical scrim, and gold typography. Floating Action Button (glass) for Cart.

screens.name: Reservation
screens.purpose: Allow users to book a table effortlessly in a sophisticated interface resembling a high-end concierge service.

states.loading: Spinner over a subtly blurred interior background.
states.empty: No past reservations text with an inviting 'Book a Table' CTA.
states.error: Error fetching availability with a retry option.

screens.layout: Large atmospheric restaurant interior image at the top. A clean, single-column form below for date, time, and party size with prominent gold accent interactive states. Sticky 'Confirm Reservation' button at bottom.

screens.name: Account
screens.purpose: Manage user profile, loyalty points (QR code), order history, and settings in a luxurious, VIP-feeling dashboard.

states.empty: Prompt to 'Sign in to access your Pizza Denfert VIP benefits'.
states.error: Error loading account details with retry.

screens.layout: Top section shows a 'VIP Loyalty Card' as a glassmorphic surface with a subtle gold gradient and the user's QR code. Below are list rows for Order History, Favorites, and Settings, using minimal dividers and feather icons.

hero_home.alt: Three gourmet wood-fired pizzas with diverse toppings

story_oven.alt: Traditional wood-fired oven showcasing vibrant flames

restaurant_interior.alt: Interior of contemporary dark restaurant with long set dining table

instructions_to_main_agent: Strictly follow the '6 Glass / Luxe DARK' personality. Use deep black (#050505) as the primary background.
Implement CormorantGaramond for all headings and large text, and Satoshi for body and UI elements. Ensure maximum weight used is 500.
For any text placed over the premium food photography, you MUST implement a gradient scrim (top to bottom, transparent to ≥75% surfaceInverse) to guarantee WCAG readability.
Use glassmorphism (expo-blur) for the bottom tab bar, sticky headers, and floating action buttons. Ensure the glass surfaces have a dark tinted base so text on top remains legible.
Build the Home screen as a storytelling cinematic experience, utilizing the `hero_home` and `story_oven` images to emphasize the artisanal, wood-fired quality.
Integrate subtle haptic feedback for adding items to the cart, switching tabs, and confirming reservations.
Avoid using any blue, purple, or indigo colors. Stick strictly to the black, cream, gold, and warm amber accents defined in the color palette.
Do NOT use emojis anywhere in the system UI.
Implement the loyalty card in the Account tab as a premium glassmorphic VIP card featuring the QR code.
